markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define ownership and responsibilities for API directory project between GrowthX and Zuplo.](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Zuplo to provide initial API dataset (name, domain, docs URL)](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [GrowthX to handle content generation, categorization, and logo retrieval](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [MVP (P1) target: \~12 pages by end of May; full launch early June](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [JSON export as deliverable for Zuplo to ingest and display](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)

## Topics

### Project Scope and Responsibilities

  - [Zuplo provides:](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [Initial API dataset (name, domain, external docs URL)](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [Category taxonomy for GrowthX to apply](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
      - [OpenAPI specs and Postman collections (when available)](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [GrowthX handles:](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [Content generation using provided context](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [API categorization based on Zuplo's taxonomy](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
      - [Logo retrieval (likely using Brandfetch API)](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
      - [Scraping additional metadata when possible](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)

### Priority Features

  - [P1 (MVP): Summary, key benefits, categorization, logo, OpenAPI spec](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [P2: Alternatives, documentation images, pricing page, Postman collection](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Future: Performance metrics, popularity scores (likely via partnerships)](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)

### Timeline and Deliverables

  - [Target: \~12 pages by end of May](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Full launch: Early June (before Zuplo's GrowthX contract renewal decision)](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Deliverable: JSON file export for Zuplo to ingest and display](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [Iterative feedback process starting next week](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)

### Strategic Value for Zuplo

  - [Leverage OpenAPI specs to upsell Zuplo's open-source projects](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Generate API documentation, security scores, and mocks](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Warm leads for potential long-term conversion to Zuplo's ecosystem](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)

### Data Sources and Scraping

  - [Utilize provided API marketplaces for initial data and cross-referencing](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Use domain as a "join key" between first-party and third-party information](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [Leverage existing data to shortcut manual processes where possible](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to add provided API list to project scope](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [Dave to sync with Daniel on requirements and dev resources](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
  - [GrowthX to start content generation, aiming for first samples by next week](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [Adrian to provide more comprehensive API list and category taxonomy](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [Iterative feedback process to begin once initial content is available](https://fathom.video/share/r37rQcCKi-avmZ6v-q_RVjb_x1GzznQs?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
